'''shoyagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabellopatellar|fabellopatellar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabellopatellar|fabellopatellar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoyagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyagithi|shoyagithi]] || [[word:shoyagiji|shoyagiji]] || [[word:shoyagishi|shoyagishi]] || [[word:shoyagiki|shoyagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyaguthuthu|shoyaguthuthu]] || [[word:shoyagujuju|shoyagujuju]] || [[word:shoyagushushu|shoyagushushu]] || [[word:shoyagukuku|shoyagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyaguthu|shoyaguthu]] || [[word:shoyaguju|shoyaguju]] || [[word:shoyagushu|shoyagushu]] || [[word:shoyaguku|shoyaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyagufthuf|shoyagufthuf]] || [[word:shoyagufjuf|shoyagufjuf]] || [[word:shoyagufshuf|shoyagufshuf]] || [[word:shoyagufkuf|shoyagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyagethe|shoyagethe]] || [[word:shoyageje|shoyageje]] || [[word:shoyageshe|shoyageshe]] || [[word:shoyageke|shoyageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyagothotho|shoyagothotho]] || [[word:shoyagojojo|shoyagojojo]] || [[word:shoyagoshosho|shoyagoshosho]] || [[word:shoyagokoko|shoyagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyagotho|shoyagotho]] || [[word:shoyagojo|shoyagojo]] || [[word:shoyagosho|shoyagosho]] || [[word:shoyagoko|shoyagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyagofthof|shoyagofthof]] || [[word:shoyagofjof|shoyagofjof]] || [[word:shoyagofshof|shoyagofshof]] || [[word:shoyagofkof|shoyagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyagïfthïf|shoyagïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfjïf|shoyagïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfshïf|shoyagïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfkïf|shoyagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyagïfthïfthïf|shoyagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfjïfjïf|shoyagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfshïfshïf|shoyagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfkïfkïf|shoyagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyagïfthïf|shoyagïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfjïf|shoyagïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfshïf|shoyagïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfkïf|shoyagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyagïfthïf|shoyagïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfjïf|shoyagïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfshïf|shoyagïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyagïfkïf|shoyagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyagæthæ|shoyagæthæ]] || [[word:shoyagæjæ|shoyagæjæ]] || [[word:shoyagæshæ|shoyagæshæ]] || [[word:shoyagækæ|shoyagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyagathatha|shoyagathatha]] || [[word:shoyagajaja|shoyagajaja]] || [[word:shoyagashasha|shoyagashasha]] || [[word:shoyagakaka|shoyagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyagatha|shoyagatha]] || [[word:shoyagaja|shoyagaja]] || [[word:shoyagasha|shoyagasha]] || [[word:shoyagaka|shoyagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyagafthaf|shoyagafthaf]] || [[word:shoyagafjaf|shoyagafjaf]] || [[word:shoyagafshaf|shoyagafshaf]] || [[word:shoyagafkaf|shoyagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoyagasha|shoyagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyagshësha|shoyagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyagrosha|shoyagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyagmusha|shoyagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyagyasha|shoyagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyagnkshësha|goshoyagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyagnkrosha|goshoyagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyagnkmusha|goshoyagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyagnkyasha|goshoyagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shoyayagasha|shoyayagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyayagshësha|shoyayagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyayagrosha|shoyayagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyayagmusha|shoyayagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyayagyasha|shoyayagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyayagnkshësha|goshoyayagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyayagnkrosha|goshoyayagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyayagnkmusha|goshoyayagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyayagnkyasha|goshoyayagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sheyægasha|sheyægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sheyægshësha|sheyægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sheyægrosha|sheyægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sheyægmusha|sheyægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sheyægyasha|sheyægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosheyægnkshësha|gosheyægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosheyægnkrosha|gosheyægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosheyægnkmusha|gosheyægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosheyægnkyasha|gosheyægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shoyfagasha|shoyfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyfagshësha|shoyfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyfagrosha|shoyfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyfagmusha|shoyfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyfagyasha|shoyfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyfagnkshësha|goshoyfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyfagnkrosha|goshoyfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyfagnkmusha|goshoyfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyfagnkyasha|goshoyfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
